channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump eases pressure on Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh as inflation tops 4%
item.description: President Donald Trump's economic advisers are giving Warsh space as the new Fed chairman on interest rates as the president repeats calls to cut.

item.title: Ex-Apollo CEO Leon Black says Jeffrey Epstein duped him out of more than $60 million
item.description: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.

item.title: OpenAI and Anthropic face new AI reality as companies shift from tokenmaxxing to efficiency
item.description: Companies are tightening their AI budgets to focus on getting a return on their investment, and that could dampen growth rates at OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: S&P 500 is little changed with chip stocks weak after OpenAI IPO delay report: Live updates
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly considering delaying its IPO and as a sell-off in tech gathered pace.

item.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is 'the most expensive market in 'American history'
item.description: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

item.title: Another DeepSeek moment? What's really behind the tech sell-off
item.description: Another Chinese model looks nearly as good as Anthropic for a fraction of the price, analysts say

item.title: One factor that may be partly behind the S&P 500's curious action this week
item.description: There were plenty of reasons for stocks to post a big move on Thursday, but the S&P 500 ended almost exactly where it closed Wednesday.

item.title: The brands winning with World Cup advertising may not be the sponsors
item.description: The World Cup winners and losers in advertising may be indicative of a broader trend of how people are responding to authentic branding.

item.title: Billionaire investor Jeremy Grantham says bitcoin will 'dwindle away with a whimper'
item.description: Jeremy Grantham renewed his long-running criticism of bitcoin, predicting it will gradually fade into irrelevance over decades.

item.title: Friday, June 26, 2026: The Club discusses its next moves for its stock portfolio
Red Lobster's Ultimate Endless Shrimp promotion described as a 'car crash' for the company, lawsuit says
item.description: "Thai Union doubled down on a campaign to squeeze out every drop of value that it could," creditors said

item.title: CNBC's Most Valuable Sports Empires 2026: Here's how the world's top 20 stack up
item.description: The world's 20 most valuable sports ownership groups are worth a combined $269 billion, according to CNBC's Most Valuable Sports Empires 2026.

item.title: Volkswagen plans to cut 15% of its workforce and close four German plants, report says
item.description: Auto giant Volkswagen is reportedly planning to cut 100,000 jobs and end production at four German plants over the coming years.

item.title: Micron sinks as it looks to wrap a whipsaw week of trading
item.description: Micron Technology's shares tumbled on Friday amid a global sell-off in technology stocks.

item.title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Crocs, Microsoft, Robinhood & more
item.description: Here are Friday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Polymarket annualized revenue surpasses $1 billion six weeks after its U.S. exchange launch
item.description: World Cup trading and the end of its U.S. waitlist are driving rapid growth for Polymarket's prediction market platform.

item.title: Rise in memory chip costs puts pressure on retailers of laptops and smartphones
item.description: As the global race for AI moves forward, a shortage of memory chips has begun to drive up prices of consumer electronics and may lead to product shortages.

item.title: Why breakthrough GLP-1 weight loss pills may be a bad thing for employer insurance coverage
item.description: New GLP-1 weight-loss pills from Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly are likely to boost consumer demand, but employer-sponsored health insurance may not foot the bill.

item.title: 'The cult of Elon': SpaceX investors grapple with volatility amid big swings
item.description: SpaceX stock has seen big spikes and drop in its opening two weeks as a public company.

item.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $70, resuming losses after attack on cargo ship near Oman
item.description: Oil extended declines on Friday, with markets focused any further breakthroughs in the Middle East conflict, while absorbing a flurry of Persian Gulf news.

item.title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly considering delaying its IPO until 2027, and SpaceX is weighing a deeper push into mobile services.

item.title: Last chance: Earn up to 90,000 bonus points with these Southwest credit card offers
item.description: These Southwest cards provide several benefits that make earning a Companion Pass much easier.

item.title: Imposter scams led fraud reports to the FTC for fifth straight year in 2025, causing $3.5 billion in losses
item.description: The amount lost to imposter scams is part of $15.9 billion in total fraud losses reported to the Federal Trade Commission in 2025

item.title: Estrogen patches are hard to find, and it may not be resolved any time soon
item.description: Estrogen patches are in short supply as demand for menopause treatments skyrockets, and it could take at least a year for manufacturers to catch up.

item.title: ON Semiconductor strikes $7 billion deal for Synaptics in physical AI push
item.description: ON Semiconductor said the deal bumps up its total addressable market by $30 billion, to $243 billion by 2030.

item.title: Shipping rebounds in Strait of Hormuz one week after U.S.-Iran deal – but fragile confidence threatens recovery
item.description: Shipping traffic through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz is recovering one week after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace deal.

item.title: Trump keeps turning Republican wins into loyalty tests — and political liabilities
item.description: President Donald Trump’s moves on housing, FISA, Iran and Washington projects are creating new headaches for Republicans trying to show voters they can govern.

item.title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
item.description: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.

item.title: U.S.-Iran peace deal grants access to Tehran's nuclear sites, UN watchdog says
item.description: "The technical work has started, and we hope to be there soon," IAEA chief Rafael Grossi said at a news conference in Japan on Friday.

item.title: Democrats probe Trump's troubled $16 million reflecting pool renovation
item.description: President Donald Trump has attempted to spruce up Washington in advance of the country's 250th anniversary.
